description: Fix RECRUIT mandate issues: auto-select bushi mode in online, limit Jinmenju to once per mandate, add undo button for recruit, and fix Jinmenju log text
steps: 1. In src/store/gameStore.ts, in the GAME_STATE handler (around line 3210), when state.recruitMandateActive is true and the local player is the current player in the recruit resolution order, set uiResets.recruitMode = true AND uiResets.recruitFigureType = 'bushi'. This ensures that in online mode, when recruit mandate starts, bushi is actually selected (not just visually). Also set uiResets.undoMandateState to a deep copy of state when the local player's recruit turn begins (similar to how marshal does it around line 3258).
2. In src/types/game.ts, add a new field 'jinmenjuUsedThisMandate: boolean' to the GameState interface (initialized to false).

3. In src/utils/gameLogic.ts, in createInitialGameState function, initialize jinmenjuUsedThisMandate: false. In the chooseMandateTile function (where recruit mandate is activated around line 690), reset jinmenjuUsedThisMandate to false.

4. In src/store/gameStore.ts, in doJinmenjuPlace (around line 549) and doJinmenjuPlaceTemple (around line 605), after placing the figure, set jinmenjuUsedThisMandate: true on the new state. Also in doJinmenjuActivate, check if gameState.jinmenjuUsedThisMandate is true - if so, return early (don't activate).

5. In src/components/ActionPanel.tsx, in the Jinmenju button section (around line where hasJinmenju and jinmenjuOnMap are checked), add a check: if gameState.jinmenjuUsedThisMandate is true, disable the button or don't render it. Add 'jinmenjuUsedThisMandate' to the condition that hides/disables the button.

6. In src/server/index.ts, add handling for jinmenjuUsedThisMandate in the RECRUIT_PLACE_FIGURE handler - when the server receives a Jinmenju placement action, set jinmenjuUsedThisMandate = true on the state. Also add a JINMENJU_PLACE and JINMENJU_PLACE_TEMPLE handler if not already present.

7. Fix the Jinmenju log messages in src/store/gameStore.ts. Change line 600 from '(pierde honor)' to '(pierde {h})' and line 649 from '(pierde honor)' to '(pierde {h})'. Then in src/components/GameLog.tsx, add a new pattern BEFORE the existing honor pattern (around line 175) that matches '{h}' and renders it as just the HonorIcon (no text). Pattern: /\{h\}/g, replacement: <HonorIcon size={14} color='#DAA520' />.

8. Ensure the undo button works for recruit in online mode. In the GAME_STATE handler, when state.recruitMandateActive is true and the local player is the current recruit player, set uiResets.undoMandateState = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(state)) ONLY if no undoMandateState currently exists (don't overwrite during local placements). The undo button is already rendered in ActionPanel when undoMandateState is truthy.
acceptance_criteria: npm run build succeeds without errors
In online mode, when recruit mandate starts, clicking on the map places bushis immediately (recruitMode is true by default)
Jinmenju button can only be used once per recruit mandate - after one use, the button is disabled/hidden
Jinmenju log messages show '(pierde <honor-icon>)' without the word 'honor'
Undo button appears during recruit mandate and works (restores state to mandate start)
